transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hello, this is Alex from DemoCompany, calling about your DemoLender loan. We reviewed your account and have a good offer to help close it. Can we talk for a moment?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Priya, your total outstanding is 50000 rupees. But we can remove all the extra charges and close your loan at just 35000 rupees — that's a saving of 15000 rupees right now.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yes. Sorry. How how is it possible?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We work directly with DemoLender, so we can waive the additional charges and penalties on your account. The 35000 rupees covers just the principal — no extra fees on top. Can I ask, Priya — what's been making it difficult to keep up with the payments so far?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Okay.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Has it been more of a job situation, or just a lot of expenses piling up lately?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Okay. I can hear from echo. I'm not able to hear your voice properly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm sorry about that, Priya. Can you hear me any better now?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I can hear you. But it's like an echo.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand, I'm sorry about that. Let's keep going — has the payment difficulty been job-related or more of an expenses issue?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Voice is not clear.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm sorry about the connection, Priya. Let me schedule a callback so we can speak clearly. What time works best for you?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hello? Yeah. Tell me.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, glad the line is better now. Has the difficulty with payments been more of a job situation, or expenses piling up?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Can you please explain it?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure — your loan with DemoLender has been overdue, and I'm trying to understand what's been making it hard to pay, so I can find the best solution for you. Is it a job issue, or something else going on?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hello? Okay.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Priya, can you hear me clearly right now? Just say yes or no.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yes. Okay. Yeah. Yeah. I can hear you. If I pay XX,XXX means that outstanding will be removed.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, exactly. If you pay 35000 rupees, your loan is fully closed — no more outstanding, no more calls, and it shows as closed on your credit report.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Is that your

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sorry, Priya, you got cut off — is that my what?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: you please share more details about it? Because I don't I mean, currently, I don't have XX,XXX.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand, Priya. When do you think you could arrange something — is it a matter of a few weeks, or is the situation more long-term right now?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: With me. But I will check and get back to you later.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand. But just so you know, this 35000 rupees closure offer won't stay open indefinitely — the sooner you act, the better. When exactly should I call you back?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: My month end.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, Priya. I'll call you back at month end. Please do keep in mind that the 35000 rupees closure offer may change if we wait too long — so try to have the funds ready by then. Take care, Priya, and we'll speak at month end. Have a good day. Thank you, Priya. Goodbye.

function_calls.params: preferred_time="month end", callback_type="normal", reason="customer needs time to arrange funds"
